metadata.name: Analyze Impact of Market Rule Change

description: The ISO has proposed a new market rule for how energy storage participates in the capacity market. An analyst needs to assess its financial impact on their battery portfolio.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve and summarize the proposed market rule change documentation from the ISO website.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear summary of the key changes.

nodes.task_description: Model the potential revenue for a battery asset under the current market rules.
Re-run the revenue model under the proposed new rules.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the revenue under the new rule set.

nodes.task_description: Quantify the financial impact of the rule change and draft a comment to submit to the ISO.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the rule change would decrease revenue by 10% and drafts a formal comment outlining the concern.
